name: knowledge-work-superpowers
description: A disciplined workflow system for research, analysis, writing, review, and evidence-backed delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-first workflows for research, analysis, writing, and delivery
interface.longDescription: Frame substantial knowledge work, plan it, research systematically, test claims against evidence, draft from sources, review the result, and verify it before delivery.
defaultPrompt: Research this question deeply and build an evidence-backed brief.
Turn this rough request into a clear knowledge-work plan.
Audit this draft for unsupported claims and missing evidence.
